brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji

workflow.name: How do I convert a lead into an opportunity and assign it to a team member?
workflow.description: This workflow will guide you through converting a lead into an opportunity within Salesforce Lightning Experience and assigning that opportunity to a team member. The process involves navigating from the Leads list, initiating the conversion process, specifying opportunity details, and finally assigning the opportunity to a team member.

steps.title: Go to Leads
steps.description: Click the 'Leads' tab in the main navigation bar to view the list of leads.

steps.title: Select a Lead
steps.description: Select the lead you want to convert by clicking on the lead's name from the list.

steps.title: Click Convert
steps.description: On the lead's detail page, click the 'Convert' button located in the upper right corner of the page.

steps.title: Select Converted Status
steps.description: In the 'Convert Lead' dialog, ensure the 'Converted Status' dropdown is set to the desired status for the conversion.

steps.title: Verify Opportunity Creation
steps.description: Ensure the 'Don't create an opportunity upon conversion' checkbox is unchecked to create a new opportunity.

steps.title: Click Convert
steps.description: Click the 'Convert' button to finalize the conversion process and create the opportunity.

steps.title: View Created Opportunity
steps.description: Click on the newly created opportunity name in the conversion confirmation dialog to view its details.

steps.title: Navigate to Opportunities
steps.description: Click the 'Opportunities' tab in the main navigation bar to see the list of all opportunities and confirm the assignment.
